assessment.name: 2025 Phase 2 Maths Snapshot
notes: Do not complete all sections in one sitting.

sections.title: Place Value
sections.topic: Read and write numbers and identify 1/10/100 before and after
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Round Whole Numbers and Decimals
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Add and Subtract Whole Numbers
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Recall Multiplication and Division Facts
sections.instructions: Run in timed mode. Each item can be shown for 4 seconds. Skips are allowed.

sections.title: Multiplication Operations
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Division Operations
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Compare and Order Decimals
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Decimals, Fractions and Percentage Conversions
sections.topic: Convert between fractions, decimals and percentages
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Multiply and Divide Numbers by 10 and 100
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Add and Subtract Decimals
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Convert Between Mixed Numbers and Improper Fractions
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Find a Fraction (or Percentage) of a Number
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Compare, Order and Simplify Fractions
sections.topic: Fraction comparison, equivalence and simplest form
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

sections.title: Add and Subtract Fractions
sections.instructions: Answer each item. Skips are allowed and tracked.

items.prompt: Round 6.4 to the nearest whole number
Round 27,431 to the nearest ten thousand
Round 13.53 to the nearest whole number
Round 729,976 to the nearest ten thousand
